name: token-beam-aseprite-plugin
description: Sync design tokens (colors) to Aseprite palette

scripts.bundle: rm -f token-beam-aseprite.zip && mkdir -p bundle/token-beam && cp token-beam.lua ok_color.lua package.json README.md bundle/token-beam/ && cd bundle && zip -r ../token-beam-aseprite.zip token-beam/ && cd .. && rm -rf bundle
scripts.install:aseprite: mkdir -p "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Aseprite/extensions/token-beam" && cp token-beam.lua ok_color.lua package.json README.md "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Aseprite/extensions/token-beam/"
